title: HIV.H Follow-up
description: This tab describes the data that are collected during the follow-up and contacting clients workflow (HIV.H)

resourceType.description: Resource type identifier for HIVHFollowup logical model

@context.description: JSON-LD context for this logical model with ValueSet vocabularies

anyOf.description: URI reference to external JSON-LD context

@type.description: JSON-LD type identifier for HIVHFollowup logical model

items.description: Coding-shaped {system, code} object from ValueSet HIV.H.DE1

reasonForFollowUp.description: The reason why the client is being followed up

otherFollowUpReasonSpecify.description: Client was followed up for another reason (specify)

clientContactAttempted.description: An attempt to locate the client was made

dateOfContactAttempt.description: Date of attempt to contact client

contactAttemptedBy.description: Who attempted to reach out to the client

contactMethod.description: Method used to try to reach out to the client

sourceOfInformation.description: Source of information about the client

otherSourceOfInformationSpecify.description: Information about the client's status was provided by someone else (specify)

outcomeFromOutreachAttempt.description: Detailed outcome from the attempt to locate the client

movedFromCatchmentArea.description: The client moved from the catchment area (may be reported from the community level)

dateClientMovedFromCatchmentArea.description: The date on which the client moved from the catchment area, if known

newCatchmentArea.description: New catchment area where the client resides

partnerOrContactOfIndexCase.description: The client was identified by an index case as a partner or contact

hivStatusOfPartnerOrContact.description: HIV status of the partner or contact given by the index case

dateOfDeath.description: If deceased, the date that the client died

placeOfDeath.description: Where the client died, if known

hivTreatmentOutcome.description: The outcome for the client which is used for reporting retention/attrition.

datePatientLostToFollowUp.description: Date patient was lost to follow-up (LTFU)

dateHivTreatmentOutcomeChanged.description: The date on which the client's outcome (lost to follow-up, transferred out, death (documented), or refused (stopped) treatment) changed

transferConfirmed.description: Select if transfer to another facility is confirmed

transferToFacility.description: Name of health facility client was transferred to

dateOfTransferOut.description: The date the client transferred out of the facility to be provided with care at another facility

adherenceAssessment.description: Whether client is adherent or not to ART regimen per national guidelines (immunological or virological monitoring)

items.description: Coding-shaped {system, code} object from ValueSet HIV.H.DE53

reasonsForAdherenceProblem.description: Reason why client is not adherent

otherReasonsForAdherenceProblem.description: Client reported not being adherent because of other reason (specify)

dateArtStopped.description: Date on which client stopped ART

items.description: Coding-shaped {system, code} object from ValueSet HIV.H.DE74

reasonArtStopped.description: Reason why client intentionally stopped ART

otherReasonForStoppingArtSpecify.description: Client stopped ART for other reason (specify)
